description: Testing the default display behavior of ranking list in various scenarios including empty list, single item, multiple items, and maximum items.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify default display on Ranking list when do not has item on list
expected_result: Has no item on list

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify default display on Ranking list when has 1 item on list
expected_result: Display list items on oder by Ranking Condition

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify default display on Ranking list when have >=2 items on list
expected_result: Display list items on oder by Ranking Condition

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify default display on Ranking list when have max items on list
expected_result: Display list items on oder by Ranking Condition

description: Testing the dynamic behavior of ranking list including priority display, real-time updates, and post-deletion behavior.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify list ranking display when setting index of 1 items that matiching with ranking condition
expected_result:
- Item is setting is priority display with setting index on Ranking list
- List ranking is displayed correctly
(List ranking is update real time or update after refresh page)
